title: senecio lingulatus
intro: Senecio lingulatus, also known as Cape marigold bush, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio lingulatus include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Senecio lingulatus include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
